---
title: "Example Vignette"
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{example}
  %\VignetteEngine{quarto::html}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    collapse: true
    comment: '#>'
---

## Typography

## H2

Header 2

### H3

Header 3

#### H4

Header 4

Paragraph text should use the brand base font. Inline code should use the brand monospace: `const x = 42`.

```text
text block should use the brand monospace.
abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz 0123456789
```

```{r}
brand::hello("brand")
```

## Theme colors (semantic)

The values below are pulled from `_brand.yml` using the `brand` shortcode.

| Token | Light | Dark |
|---|---|---|
| background | `{{< brand color background light >}}` | `{{< brand color background dark >}}` |
| foreground | `{{< brand color foreground light >}}` | `{{< brand color foreground dark >}}` |
| primary | `{{< brand color primary light >}}` | `{{< brand color primary dark >}}` |
| secondary | `{{< brand color secondary light >}}` | `{{< brand color secondary dark >}}` |
| tertiary | `{{< brand color tertiary light >}}` | `{{< brand color tertiary dark >}}` |
| success | `{{< brand color success light >}}` | `{{< brand color success dark >}}` |
| info | `{{< brand color info light >}}` | `{{< brand color info dark >}}` |
| warning | `{{< brand color warning light >}}` | `{{< brand color warning dark >}}` |
| danger | `{{< brand color danger light >}}` | `{{< brand color danger dark >}}` |

## Palette (named swatches)

These are the single-value entries under `color.palette`.

| Name | Value |
|---|---|
| ivory | `{{< brand color ivory >}}` |
| ink | `{{< brand color ink >}}` |
| blackish | `{{< brand color blackish >}}` |
| cobalt | `{{< brand color cobalt >}}` |
| periwinkle | `{{< brand color periwinkle >}}` |
| slate | `{{< brand color slate >}}` |
| mist | `{{< brand color mist >}}` |
| haze | `{{< brand color haze >}}` |
| shadow | `{{< brand color shadow >}}` |
| teal | `{{< brand color teal >}}` |
| amber | `{{< brand color amber >}}` |
| rose | `{{< brand color rose >}}` |

## Components

::: {.callout-note}
Info callout.
:::

::: {.callout-warning}
Warning callout.
:::

::: {.callout-important}
Danger callout. 
:::

::: {.callout-tip}
Tip callout.
:::

::: {.callout-caution}
Caution callout.
:::

> Blockquote example. This should remain readable in both light and dark modes.

### Table

| Item | Example |
|---|---|
| Link | <https://www.visruth.com> |
| Inline code | `printf("hello")` |
| List | - one<br>- two<br>- three |
